like finding your dream clients people you do want to work with and building a business around that not like taking a project you had and trying to build a business around that I promise you if you engineered around the the the person and not the product and make your life a million times easier and secret formula is all about that number two then is the value ladder okay if you want to be successful in this or in any business if you do not have a value ladder it gets really really hard one of my favorite concepts about the dot-com secrets book is a quote I got in there from Dan Kennedy says the company that can spend the most money to acquire customer wins okay and so for you if you want to go out there and competing against a whole bunch of other chiropractors or dentists or people in the weight loss market or financial newsletter whatever your business is if you can't if everybody else now spend you're gonna lose you cannot spend everybody else you're gonna win and that's the core thing so how do you do that well you can't do it if you're just selling a $20 product like you can only spend $20 to sell a product and there's no way you're gonna win in my business I can spend two or three hundred dollars to give way for your trial because I have a value ladder and so I can outspend all my competitors and that's that's the key way you guys understand so the value allows you to show you how to structure business you have all those back-end opportunities then from there we talk about shifting from a value ladder to a funnel because this whole world as you know if you've been around me at all and if not you're gonna start going through this with me is all about funnels like where we funneling people through so you take your value ladder and how you structure that into an actual sales funnel after that we talked about how to find your dream customers which is really really fun and then the three types of traffic and we even get into a little bit of funnel hacking in
